attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on GC team miscalculations, taking low-threat escapes with significant time deficits (18+ minutes down) that allow extended freedom before mountain stages recalibrate.
team_tactics: Functions as tactical domestique willing to sacrifice personal stage ambitions to escort and position teammates; team accepts controlled time losses when he's in break to preserve energy for domestique duties in key mountain blocks.
terrain_preference: Transitional flat-to-mountain stages where GC teams underestimate break threats; exposed on decisive mountain stages where large time deficits and domestique role eliminate GC viability.
vulnerability: Lacks climbing strength to defend temporary GC gains once serious mountains arrive; teams readily concede 30+ seconds knowing mountains will resolve any artificial GC position gained from breaks.
key_patterns: Takes pink/leader jerseys from massive time deficits (18+ min), recognized as temporary symbolic victories (2 instances)
GC teams deliberately allow him freedom, calculating deficit makes him non-threatening (3 instances)
Prioritizes team tactics over personal results, dropping from breaks to escort teammates (2 instances)
Time losses accepted/controlled before decisive mountain stages where domestique role resumes (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent 2023 Giro pattern shows him functioning consistently in assigned domestique role with temporary GC anomalies, no performance progression evident
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8
